summary: See clues file for full details. 4 tossups, 12 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 4 tossups and 12 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: The landscape in Fra Bartolomeo's Madonna and Child with the Young Saint John the Baptist quotes from the background of this artist's Virgin and Child and Two Angels in the Uffizi.
examples: The landscape in Fra Bartolomeo's Madonna and Child with the Young Saint John the Baptist quotes from the background of this artist's Virgin and Child and Two Angels in the Uffizi.

clues.clue: The crowned title figure kneels next to a wheel and spike and has a ring placed on her finger by Jesus in one of his works.
examples: The crowned title figure kneels next to a wheel and spike and has a ring placed on her finger by Jesus in one of his works.

clues.clue: He's not Hugo van der Goes, but a kneeling Tommaso Portinari and his wife flank the bottom corners of a Jerusalem cityscape by this artist with 23 scenes from the Passion of Christ.
examples: He's not Hugo van der Goes, but a kneeling Tommaso Portinari and his wife flank the bottom corners of a Jerusalem cityscape by this artist with 23 scenes from the Passion of Christ.

clues.clue: The Met owns his (*) Mystic Marriage of St.
examples: The Met owns his (*) Mystic Marriage of St.

clues.clue: Portinari's partner, Jacopo Toni, commissioned a triptych by this artist seized by pirates which depicts souls entering the Gate of Saint Peter on the left and an armored Michael balancing souls on a scale in its center panel.
examples: Portinari's partner, Jacopo Toni, commissioned a triptych by this artist seized by pirates which depicts souls entering the Gate of Saint Peter on the left and an armored Michael balancing souls on a scale in its center panel.

clues.clue: When this artwork is closed, one can see kneeling donor portraits of Angelo Tani and Caterina Tanagli in front of grisaille statues of the Virgin and Child and reptilian demons clinging to the armor of St.
examples: When this artwork is closed, one can see kneeling donor portraits of Angelo Tani and Caterina Tanagli in front of grisaille statues of the Virgin and Child and reptilian demons clinging to the armor of St.

clues.clue: Though it is not the Portinari altarpiece, Tommaso Portinari can be seen in this painting, in which he is carried by an angel with peacock wings that is wearing a red brocaded robe and armor made of gold.
examples: Though it is not the Portinari altarpiece, Tommaso Portinari can be seen in this painting, in which he is carried by an angel with peacock wings that is wearing a red brocaded robe and armor made of gold.

clues.clue: The left side of this painting features angels sitting on a Gothic facade, as people are led up a crystal staircase.
examples: The left side of this painting features angels sitting on a Gothic facade, as people are led up a crystal staircase.

clues.clue: The center of this polyptych features a lily of mercy and red sword of justice levitating above the head of Jesus Christ, who appears in a red robe as he rests his feet on a sphere of gold.
examples: The center of this polyptych features a lily of mercy and red sword of justice levitating above the head of Jesus Christ, who appears in a red robe as he rests his feet on a sphere of gold.

clues.clue: The bottom of the central panel of this triptych features St.
examples: The bottom of the central panel of this triptych features St.

clues.clue: Michael using a scale and crosier to separate the damned and the saved.
examples: Michael using a scale and crosier to separate the damned and the saved.

clues.clue: This artist used whitish tones to depict St.
examples: This artist used whitish tones to depict St.
